title: strychnos splendens
intro: Strychnos splendens, also known as the African strychnine tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its toxic properties due to the presence of strychnine. Traditionally, the medicinal properties of Strychnos splendens have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to exercise extreme caution when handling the plant due to its toxicity.
